```{=html}
<style>
.reveal .scale-ladder {
  display: block;
  width: min(100%, 1180px);
  max-height: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder text {
  font-family: var(--r-main-font, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif);
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .stage-label,
.reveal .scale-ladder .scale-label {
  fill: #f6fbff;
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .stage-subtitle {
  fill: #b8d3e5;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 450;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .axis-line {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #18b9ff;
  stroke-width: 5;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  filter: url(#scale-ladder-blue-glow);
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .axis-segment {
  stroke-dasharray: 160;
  stroke-dashoffset: 160;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .fragment.visible .axis-segment {
  animation: scale-ladder-draw 0.72s ease-out forwards;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .axis-node {
  fill: #02070a;
  stroke: #18b9ff;
  stroke-width: 5;
  filter: url(#scale-ladder-blue-glow);
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .axis-tick {
  stroke: #8bdfff;
  stroke-width: 3.5;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  opacity: 0.82;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .axis-tick.small {
  stroke-width: 2.2;
  opacity: 0.55;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .scale-guide {
  stroke: rgba(246, 251, 255, 0.32);
  stroke-width: 2;
  stroke-dasharray: 7 11;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .scale-beam {
  stroke: #ffcc8a;
  stroke-width: 3.5;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-dasharray: 1 14;
  animation: scale-ladder-flow 2.4s linear infinite;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .cheese-face {
  fill: #ffd43b;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .cheese-side {
  fill: #f7b51c;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .cheese-top {
  fill: #ffe15a;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .molecule-bond {
  stroke: #6dd4ff;
  stroke-width: 10;
  stroke-linecap: round;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .atom-orbit {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #21c8ff;
  stroke-width: 4.8;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .electron {
  fill: #45d6ff;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .quark-spring {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #244cff;
  stroke-width: 3;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
}

.reveal .scale-ladder .quark-shell {
  fill: url(#scale-ladder-quark-shell);
}

@keyframes scale-ladder-draw {
  to {
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
}

@keyframes scale-ladder-flow {
  to {
    stroke-dashoffset: -45;
  }
}
</style>

<svg class="scale-ladder" viewBox="0 0 1120 640" role="img" aria-label="Scale ladder from macroscopic matter to quarks">
  <defs>
    <filter id="scale-ladder-blue-glow" x="-80%" y="-80%" width="260%" height="260%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>

    <filter id="scale-ladder-soft-glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="7" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>

    <radialGradient id="scale-ladder-red-nucleon" cx="35%" cy="28%" r="72%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff8c8f"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e32634"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <radialGradient id="scale-ladder-blue-nucleon" cx="35%" cy="28%" r="72%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#9fd0ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2f67d4"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <radialGradient id="scale-ladder-quark-shell" cx="36%" cy="30%" r="78%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff5757"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e91422"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <radialGradient id="scale-ladder-atom-core" cx="35%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c6f1ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#43a8f4"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <radialGradient id="scale-ladder-carbon" cx="35%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff07a"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f5b51c"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <radialGradient id="scale-ladder-oxygen" cx="35%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff9a9d"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ee3342"/>
    </radialGradient>

    <radialGradient id="scale-ladder-hydrogen" cx="35%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f9fdff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#98dfff"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <rect x="8" y="8" width="1104" height="624" rx="30" fill="#02070a"/>

  <g aria-label="scale axis">
    <path d="M 112 66 L 112 86" class="axis-line"/>
    <circle cx="112" cy="76" r="9" class="axis-node"/>
    <line x1="82" y1="76" x2="152" y2="76" class="axis-tick"/>
    <line x1="98" y1="104" x2="139" y2="104" class="axis-tick small"/>
    <line x1="98" y1="132" x2="139" y2="132" class="axis-tick small"/>
    <line x1="98" y1="160" x2="139" y2="160" class="axis-tick small"/>
    <line x1="148" y1="76" x2="312" y2="76" class="scale-guide"/>
    <text x="174" y="85" class="scale-label">~ 1 cm</text>
    <line x1="322" y1="76" x2="410" y2="76" class="scale-beam"/>

    <g class="scale-stage fragment" data-fragment-index="1">
      <path d="M 112 86 L 112 230" class="axis-line axis-segment"/>
      <circle cx="112" cy="230" r="9" class="axis-node"/>
      <line x1="82" y1="230" x2="152" y2="230" class="axis-tick"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="184" x2="139" y2="184" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="208" x2="139" y2="208" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="148" y1="230" x2="312" y2="230" class="scale-guide"/>
      <text x="174" y="239" class="scale-label">~ 10<tspan baseline-shift="super" font-size="16">-7</tspan> cm</text>
      <line x1="322" y1="230" x2="445" y2="230" class="scale-beam"/>
    </g>

    <g class="scale-stage fragment" data-fragment-index="2">
      <path d="M 112 230 L 112 385" class="axis-line axis-segment"/>
      <circle cx="112" cy="385" r="9" class="axis-node"/>
      <line x1="82" y1="385" x2="152" y2="385" class="axis-tick"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="268" x2="139" y2="268" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="302" x2="139" y2="302" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="334" x2="139" y2="334" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="360" x2="139" y2="360" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="148" y1="385" x2="312" y2="385" class="scale-guide"/>
      <text x="174" y="394" class="scale-label">~ 10<tspan baseline-shift="super" font-size="16">-8</tspan> cm</text>
      <line x1="322" y1="385" x2="445" y2="385" class="scale-beam"/>
    </g>

    <g class="scale-stage fragment" data-fragment-index="3">
      <path d="M 112 385 L 112 585" class="axis-line axis-segment"/>
      <circle cx="112" cy="585" r="9" class="axis-node"/>
      <line x1="82" y1="585" x2="152" y2="585" class="axis-tick"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="426" x2="139" y2="426" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="462" x2="139" y2="462" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="498" x2="139" y2="498" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="532" x2="139" y2="532" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="98" y1="558" x2="139" y2="558" class="axis-tick small"/>
      <line x1="148" y1="585" x2="312" y2="585" class="scale-guide"/>
      <text x="174" y="594" class="scale-label">~ 10<tspan baseline-shift="super" font-size="16">-13</tspan> cm</text>
      <line x1="322" y1="585" x2="445" y2="585" class="scale-beam"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <g aria-label="macroscopic matter">
    <text x="462" y="85" class="stage-label">matter</text>
    <text x="462" y="109" class="stage-subtitle">macroscopic sample</text>
    <g transform="translate(865 30)" filter="url(#scale-ladder-soft-glow)">
      <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="translate" values="865 28; 865 34; 865 28" dur="4.6s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <path d="M 0 38 L 88 0 L 178 40 L 178 106 L 86 142 L 0 101 z" class="cheese-face"/>
      <path d="M 0 38 L 86 73 L 86 142 L 0 101 z" class="cheese-side"/>
      <path d="M 86 73 L 178 40 L 178 106 L 86 142 z" fill="#ffd84e"/>
      <path d="M 0 38 L 88 0 L 178 40 L 86 73 z" class="cheese-top"/>
      <circle cx="45" cy="44" r="9" fill="#050505"/>
      <circle cx="88" cy="20" r="10" fill="#050505"/>
      <circle cx="135" cy="49" r="8" fill="#050505"/>
      <circle cx="36" cy="86" r="12" fill="#050505"/>
      <circle cx="101" cy="98" r="10" fill="#050505"/>
      <circle cx="150" cy="83" r="12" fill="#050505"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <g class="scale-stage fragment" data-fragment-index="1" aria-label="molecules">
    <text x="462" y="239" class="stage-label">molecules</text>
    <text x="462" y="263" class="stage-subtitle">chemistry scale</text>
    <g transform="translate(825 170)" filter="url(#scale-ladder-soft-glow)">
      <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="translate" values="825 167; 825 174; 825 167" dur="3.7s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <line x1="58" y1="70" x2="99" y2="47" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <line x1="99" y1="47" x2="141" y2="70" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <line x1="141" y1="70" x2="141" y2="118" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <line x1="141" y1="118" x2="99" y2="141" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <line x1="99" y1="141" x2="58" y2="118" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <line x1="58" y1="118" x2="58" y2="70" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <line x1="141" y1="70" x2="187" y2="45" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <line x1="58" y1="118" x2="22" y2="148" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <line x1="99" y1="141" x2="100" y2="188" class="molecule-bond"/>
      <circle cx="58" cy="70" r="18" fill="url(#scale-ladder-carbon)"/>
      <circle cx="99" cy="47" r="18" fill="url(#scale-ladder-carbon)"/>
      <circle cx="141" cy="70" r="18" fill="url(#scale-ladder-carbon)"/>
      <circle cx="141" cy="118" r="18" fill="url(#scale-ladder-carbon)"/>
      <circle cx="99" cy="141" r="18" fill="url(#scale-ladder-carbon)"/>
      <circle cx="58" cy="118" r="18" fill="url(#scale-ladder-carbon)"/>
      <circle cx="187" cy="45" r="16" fill="url(#scale-ladder-oxygen)"/>
      <circle cx="22" cy="148" r="13" fill="url(#scale-ladder-hydrogen)"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="188" r="13" fill="url(#scale-ladder-hydrogen)"/>
      <circle cx="99" cy="94" r="23" fill="#02070a" opacity="0.92"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <g class="scale-stage fragment" data-fragment-index="2" aria-label="atoms">
    <text x="462" y="394" class="stage-label">atoms</text>
    <text x="462" y="418" class="stage-subtitle">electrons and nucleus</text>
    <g transform="translate(818 338)" filter="url(#scale-ladder-soft-glow)">
      <g transform="rotate(-18 105 100)">
        <path d="M 217 100 A 112 33 0 1 1 -7 100 A 112 33 0 1 1 217 100" class="atom-orbit"/>
        <circle r="7" class="electron">
          <animateMotion dur="6.4s" repeatCount="indefinite"
            path="M 217 100 A 112 33 0 1 1 -7 100 A 112 33 0 1 1 217 100"/>
        </circle>
      </g>
      <g transform="rotate(50 105 100)">
        <path d="M 209 100 A 104 28 0 1 1 1 100 A 104 28 0 1 1 209 100" class="atom-orbit" opacity="0.9"/>
        <circle r="6" class="electron">
          <animateMotion dur="8.2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="-2s"
            path="M 209 100 A 104 28 0 1 1 1 100 A 104 28 0 1 1 209 100"/>
        </circle>
      </g>
      <g transform="rotate(112 105 100)">
        <path d="M 201 100 A 96 25 0 1 1 9 100 A 96 25 0 1 1 201 100" class="atom-orbit" opacity="0.82"/>
        <circle r="6" class="electron">
          <animateMotion dur="7.2s" repeatCount="indefinite" begin="-4s"
            path="M 201 100 A 96 25 0 1 1 9 100 A 96 25 0 1 1 201 100"/>
        </circle>
      </g>
      <circle cx="105" cy="100" r="18" fill="url(#scale-ladder-atom-core)"/>
      <circle cx="105" cy="100" r="5" fill="#f6fbff" opacity="0.8"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <g class="scale-stage fragment" data-fragment-index="3" aria-label="nuclei and quarks">
    <text x="462" y="572" class="stage-label">nuclei and nucleons</text>
    <text x="462" y="596" class="stage-subtitle">protons, neutrons, quarks</text>
    <g transform="translate(720 486)" filter="url(#scale-ladder-soft-glow)">
      <circle cx="94" cy="82" r="70" fill="rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.08)" stroke="rgba(246, 251, 255, 0.18)" stroke-width="2"/>
      <circle cx="69" cy="56" r="25" fill="url(#scale-ladder-blue-nucleon)"/>
      <circle cx="99" cy="47" r="26" fill="url(#scale-ladder-red-nucleon)"/>
      <circle cx="129" cy="61" r="25" fill="url(#scale-ladder-blue-nucleon)"/>
      <circle cx="58" cy="88" r="27" fill="url(#scale-ladder-red-nucleon)"/>
      <circle cx="95" cy="82" r="29" fill="url(#scale-ladder-blue-nucleon)"/>
      <circle cx="135" cy="95" r="27" fill="url(#scale-ladder-red-nucleon)"/>
      <circle cx="82" cy="121" r="25" fill="url(#scale-ladder-blue-nucleon)"/>
      <circle cx="118" cy="124" r="25" fill="url(#scale-ladder-red-nucleon)"/>
      <circle cx="94" cy="82" r="70" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.04)"/>
    </g>

    <g transform="translate(1010 482)" filter="url(#scale-ladder-soft-glow)">
      <circle cx="74" cy="74" r="64" class="quark-shell"/>
      <polyline class="quark-spring" points="63,54 66,49 69,59 72,49 75,59 78,49 81,59 85,54">
        <animate attributeName="points" dur="1.35s" repeatCount="indefinite"
          values="63,54 66,49 69,59 72,49 75,59 78,49 81,59 85,54;
                  64,54 67,51 70,57 73,51 76,57 79,51 82,57 84,54;
                  63,54 66,49 69,59 72,49 75,59 78,49 81,59 85,54"/>
      </polyline>
      <polyline class="quark-spring" points="54,73 59,73 57,79 63,79 61,85 67,85 64,91">
        <animate attributeName="points" dur="1.55s" repeatCount="indefinite"
          values="54,73 59,73 57,79 63,79 61,85 67,85 64,91;
                  55,74 59,75 59,79 63,80 63,85 66,86 65,90;
                  54,73 59,73 57,79 63,79 61,85 67,85 64,91"/>
      </polyline>
      <polyline class="quark-spring" points="94,73 89,73 91,79 85,79 87,85 81,85 84,91">
        <animate attributeName="points" dur="1.45s" repeatCount="indefinite"
          values="94,73 89,73 91,79 85,79 87,85 81,85 84,91;
                  93,74 89,75 89,79 85,80 85,85 82,86 83,90;
                  94,73 89,73 91,79 85,79 87,85 81,85 84,91"/>
      </polyline>
      <circle cx="43" cy="54" r="21" fill="url(#scale-ladder-carbon)"/>
      <circle cx="105" cy="54" r="21" fill="url(#scale-ladder-carbon)"/>
      <circle cx="74" cy="107" r="21" fill="url(#scale-ladder-hydrogen)"/>
      <text x="37" y="61" font-size="15" font-weight="650" fill="#111">u</text>
      <text x="99" y="61" font-size="15" font-weight="650" fill="#111">u</text>
      <text x="68" y="114" font-size="15" font-weight="650" fill="#111">d</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
```
